menu_items.name: Shrimp with Lobster Sauce
menu_items.description: Plump shrimp in a silky egg and black bean lobster sauce.

menu_items.description: Fresh shrimp stir-fried with tender broccoli in garlic sauce.

menu_items.description: Shrimp with peanuts, vegetables, and chilies in a spicy Kung Pao sauce.

menu_items.name: Shrimp with Mixed Vegetables
menu_items.description: Sautéed shrimp with a colorful variety of fresh vegetables.

menu_items.name: Scallops with Garlic Sauce
menu_items.description: Tender scallops sautéed with a fragrant garlic and chili sauce.

menu_items.name: Fish Fillet with Black Bean Sauce
menu_items.description: Delicate fish fillet with peppers and onions in savory black bean sauce.

menu_items.name: Seafood Combination
menu_items.description: A generous mix of shrimp, scallops, and fish with vegetables in a light sauce.

menu_items.name: Sesame Shrimp
menu_items.description: Crispy shrimp in a sweet sesame sauce topped with toasted sesame seeds.

menu_items.name: Moo Shu Shrimp
